;<span id="Collection">collection</span>
:learning material used in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]]. A '''collection''' is made of single pieces of knowledge called [[Glossary:Element|element]]s. The simplest elements have the form of a question and an answer. A '''collection''' of a given name is stored in a folder/directory that bears the same name, and all its important statistical and learning data are stored in a file with the extension ''kno''. In older SuperMemos, collections of [[Glossary:Element|element]]s were called ''knowledge systems'' ([https://super-memory.com/articles/soft/sm8.htm SuperMemo 8]) or ''databases'' ([https://super-memory.com/articles/soft/sm7.htm SuperMemo 7] and earlier)
